extract: Absol (Japanese: アブソル Absol) is a Dark-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Absol can Mega Evolve into two forms: Mega Absol using the Absolite. Mega Absol Z using the Absolite Z. Mega Absol Z was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
